properties.name: jwt.secret
properties.description: Secret key used to sign and verify JWT tokens. Must be at least 256 bits for HMAC-SHA256.

properties.name: jwt.expiration
properties.description: JWT token expiration time in milliseconds. Default: 86400000 (24 hours).

properties.name: ai.service.base-url
properties.description: Base URL of the Python FastAPI AI microservice. Default: http://localhost:8000.
